title: tephroseris kawakamii
intro: Tephroseris kawakamii, also known as the Japanese Mountain Daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris kawakamii are said to include reducing fever, alleviating sore throats and coughs, and treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
